decisions.decision: Phase executed in priority order: P0 -> P1 -> P2
decisions.rationale: Critical fixes must pass verification before premium UX work begins

decisions.decision: No backend API changes — only admin CMS content + storefront UI modifications
decisions.rationale: Scope boundary to keep phase focused and low-risk

decisions.decision: Brand colors: Sendra Red (#C92127) for CTAs, Gold (#C5A059) for accents
Body font: Inter (or Montserrat), keep Abril Fatface for display headings
decisions.rationale: Premium feel for jewellery brand; Inter is clean and modern

next_action: Resume with: /gsd-resume-work. First action: read BAGISTO-ADMIN-GUIDES.md and have developer run Bagisto admin to fix product images, switch currency to INR, and populate CMS pages. Once P0 verification passes, continue with P1 work (product specs, filters, social login, 'Join Sendra Gold' heading, SVG icons).
context_notes: Phase 1.2 is an inserted phase after Phase 1.1. It addresses 18 UI/UX findings from a comprehensive audit. All code changes so far are in sendra-storefront/ (Next.js). Backend changes require manual Bagisto admin interaction. The session ended at context exhaustion (~90%). The mega-menu and breadcrumbs are implemented but not yet verified visually. Social login is blocked on OAuth credentials. The 01.2-PLAN.md has 4 plans (01.2-01 through 01.2-04) with Wave 1/Wave 2 task groupings.
